channel.title: GitHub Swift Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Swift in GitHub

item.title: Alamofire/Alamofire
item.description: Elegant HTTP Networking in Swift

item.title: stripe/stripe-ios
item.description: Stripe iOS SDK

item.title: airbnb/lottie-ios
item.description: An iOS library to natively render After Effects vector animations

item.title: CodeEditApp/CodeEdit
item.description: 📝 CodeEdit App for macOS – Elevate your code editing experience. Open source, free forever.

item.title: SnapKit/SnapKit
item.description: A Swift Autolayout DSL for iOS & OS X

item.title: whoeevee/EeveeSpotify
item.description: A tweak to get Spotify Premium for free, just like Spotilife

item.title: krzyzanowskim/CryptoSwift
item.description: CryptoSwift is a growing collection of standard and secure cryptographic algorithms implemented in Swift

item.title: apple/swift-collections
item.description: Commonly used data structures for Swift

item.title: realm/SwiftLint
item.description: A tool to enforce Swift style and conventions.

item.title: SDWebImage/SDWebImageSwiftUI
item.description: SwiftUI Image loading and Animation framework powered by SDWebImage

item.title: pointfreeco/swift-dependencies
item.description: A dependency management library inspired by SwiftUI's "environment."

item.title: iina/iina
item.description: The modern video player for macOS.

item.title: mrousavy/react-native-vision-camera
item.description: 📸 A powerful, high-performance React Native Camera library.

item.title: onevcat/Kingfisher
item.description: A lightweight, pure-Swift library for downloading and caching images from the web.

item.title: yonaskolb/XcodeGen
item.description: A Swift command line tool for generating your Xcode project

item.title: ReactiveX/RxSwift
item.description: Reactive Programming in Swift

item.title: signalapp/Signal-iOS
item.description: A private messenger for iOS.

item.title: facebook/facebook-ios-sdk
item.description: Used to integrate the Facebook Platform with your iOS & tvOS apps.

item.title: tuist/tuist
item.description: Tuist's CLI

item.title: Moya/Moya
item.description: Network abstraction layer written in Swift.

item.title: swiftlang/swift-package-manager
item.description: The Package Manager for the Swift Programming Language
